title: Codex self-improving loop and Harness Hub
summary: A source-backed insight post should convert external material into project-specific iteration evidence.

intent.primaryQuestion: How should external material change Harness Hub iteration?
intent.decision: Publish source-backed project insight and iteration records.
successCriteria: Every public claim links back to source metadata.
Project actions are bounded to the current iteration.

sections.title: Source Claims
sections.content: - **fact** `claim-trace-to-eval`: Production traces can become structured evidence for iterative agent improvements.

sections.title: Viewpoint Extraction
sections.content: - `view-evidence-loop`: External reading should become evidence-backed iteration, not a detached summary. Trace: `claim-trace-to-eval`.

sections.title: Project Mapping
sections.content: - **effective-interact**: Use it as the first draft layer for public insight posts. Action: generate a publishable HTML draft from a structured insight input.

sections.title: Iteration Record
sections.content:
### Changed
- Treat insight posts as durable project iteration records.

### Confirmed
- Do not turn source material into rewritten source summaries.

sections.title: Action Boundary
sections.content:
### Now
- Add source-ledger and Pages preflight.

### Not Now
- Do not build a broad CMS.

evidence.label: Building self-improving tax agents with Codex
evidence.value: Used as product inspiration, not copied as article text.
evidence.sourceTitle: Building self-improving tax agents with Codex
knownLimits: Source text is used for attribution and bounded excerpts only.

claims.statement: [fact] Production traces can become structured evidence for iterative agent improvements.
